name: Roshan Raj Mishra
comment: Borneel is an excellent resource at Codepth. His all-round knowledge of data science and ability to present his research effectively by his writing prowess makes him a truly valuable asset in the team. I've been working with him for over a year now, and I vouch for his skills and believe in his potential.

name: Rahul Bordoloi
comment: Borneel's exceptional talents have made a significant impact on our team's productivity. Whether in coding competitions, hackathons, or as a mentor in data science, he consistently stands out and ensures everyone's satisfaction. Borneel is my top recommendation, both as a team member and a leader.

name: Abhishek Mondal
comment: I've worked closely with Borneel in Codepth. He is a very passionate learner, an enthusiastic coder and a self-motivated person. He can come up with unique ideas and solutions to problems presented before him. He's also very helpful towards his fellow colleagues and persons around him.
